Attribute Mapping Notes: Primary key transformation required: char(3) to GUID. Requires lookup/mapping table or NEWID() generation. Business key CUSTOMER should map to CustomerNumber for reference.
Direct business key mapping. Source CUSTOMER (3-char code) maps to Target CustomerNumber. Data type conversion: char(3) → varchar(50) with padding/formatting as needed.
Conceptual mapping: CLIENT_GROUP represents customer categorization. Requires lookup table to map char(1) codes to CustomerTypeId GUIDs. May need reference data migration.
Descriptive field mapping with data type expansion. char(45) → varchar(255). May concatenate with other descriptive fields if needed.
Primary name field mapping. Data type conversion: char(45) → nvarchar(128). Unicode support added in target. Trim trailing spaces from source.
Secondary name field. Concatenate CUSTOMER_NAME + CUSTOMER_NAME2 with space/delimiter into single CustomerName field if both populated. Handle nulls appropriately.
Tax identifier mapping. SSN (Social Security Number) maps to TIN (Tax Identification Number). Data type: char(9) → varchar(50). Format with dashes if required (XXX-XX-XXXX).
Alternative tax identifier. FEDERAL_ID (EIN) also maps to TIN. Prioritize FEDERAL_ID over SSN for business entities. Apply formatting as needed.
State identifier mapping to TCC (Tax Clearance Certificate) number. Data type: char(20) → varchar(50). Verify business rule alignment for this mapping.
Audit timestamp mapping. datetime → datetime2(7) provides higher precision. Direct mapping with potential precision adjustment.
Audit user mapping. Requires user lookup: char(12) username → uniqueidentifier UserId. Needs user migration/mapping table.
New required field in target. No source equivalent. Populate with system user GUID or derive from CHANGED_BY if CHANGED date equals creation date.
New required field in target. No source equivalent. Use earliest CHANGED date or system migration date as default.
New required field. No direct source. Default to 1 (true) for all migrated records unless business rules indicate otherwise.
New required field. No source equivalent. Populate from configuration/default value or derive from CLIENT_GROUP if applicable.
New optional field. No source. Default to NULL or 0. May require post-migration configuration.
New optional field for party relationship. No source. Leave NULL initially; populate through separate business party migration process.
New optional field. No source. Leave NULL for active customers.
New optional field. No source. Leave NULL for active customers.
